# 03-Create or deprecate an NPM package [PUT]

`PUT /api/v4/projects/{id}/packages/npm/{package_name}`

Creates or deprecates an NPM package for a specified project. Deprecate support was added in GitLab 16.0.

### Parameters

| Name | Type | In | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | `any` | `path` | Yes | The ID or URL-encoded path of the project |
| `package_name` | `string` | `path` | Yes | Package name |

### Request Body (multipart/form-data)

```json
{
  "file": string (required), // The package file to be published (generated by Multipart middleware)
}
```
### Responses

#### 200 - OK

#### 400 - Bad Request

#### 401 - Unauthorized

#### 403 - Forbidden

#### 404 - Not Found
